input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.7
            TITLE: roll hoop bracing attachment

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.7: Roll Hoop Bracing Attachment
F.7.7 Roll Hoop Bracing Attachment 
Attachment of tubular Front or Main Hoop Bracing to the monocoque must obey F.7.8.

final_answer: rule F.7.7: Roll Hoop Bracing Attachment F.7.7 Roll Hoop Bracing Attachment Attachment of tubular Front or Main Hoop Bracing to the monocoque must obey F.7.8.
